title: Federal Reserve Board - 2026 Press Releases
summary: This is a listing page aggregating Federal Reserve Board press releases from January through March 2026. The page contains 26 individual announcements spanning banking applications, enforcement actions, monetary policy items (FOMC minutes, discount rate meeting minutes), regulatory proposals (capital rule modernization, tokenized securities capital treatment), and other administrative notices. The page is not a single source document but an index requiring individual archive records for each substantive press release.
key_points: This is a listing/index page containing 26 separate Fed press releases, not a single source document suitable for direct archiving
Notable monetary policy items: FOMC minutes from January 27-28, 2026 released 2/18/2026; discount rate meeting minutes from January 20, 28 (2/24/2026) and December 10, 2025 (1/6/2026)
Notable regulatory items: Capital rule modernization proposal (3/19/2026), tokenized securities capital treatment clarification (3/5/2026), stress test scenarios finalized (2/4/2026)
Banking applications approved: Home BancShares, Associated Banc-Corp, FirstSun Capital Bancorp, Fulton Financial Corporation, Fifth Third Bancorp, and others

Enforcement actions issued against former employees of Ally Bank, Regions Bank, Equity Bank, First State Bank of Dongola, East Cambridge Savings Bank, United Bank, First Financial Bank, and PrimeLending
Other items: Wells Fargo enforcement action terminated (3/5/2026); ICBC and Standard Chartered enforcement actions terminated (3/10/2026)
why_it_matters: This listing page serves as a reference index to Fed communications but cannot substitute for individual source documents. Researchers should extract individual press releases for substantive items like FOMC minutes, regulatory proposals, and stress test frameworks. The page provides visibility into the breadth of Fed activity in Q1 2026 including supervisory priorities and enforcement trends.
macro_context: This page aggregates Fed communications relevant to macro conditions including FOMC minutes, discount rate decisions, and capital regulation proposals. The FOMC minutes from January 27-28, 2026 would contain policy deliberations for potential rate actions. The capital rule modernization proposal (3/19/2026) could affect bank lending capacity and credit availability.
market_structure_context: The tokenized securities capital treatment clarification (3/5/2026) and stress test scenarios finalization (2/4/2026) are relevant to market structure. The page notes the Fed will maintain current stress test-related capital requirements while considering public feedback.

issues_found: This is a listing/index page aggregating 26 separate Fed announcements - the page itself contains only titles and dates without substantive content
Individual substantive items (FOMC minutes, capital rule proposals, stress test frameworks) should be extracted as separate records with full source content
Some items listed are not relevant to market structure or macro catalysts (e.g., banking application approvals, routine enforcement actions against former employees)
PAGE_TYPE in metadata is 'press_release' but content is actually a chronological listing/index, making this a container page rather than an article
Record correctly identifies the source limitations and recommends breaking out individual items, but the source itself is too thin for direct archiving

human_review.notes: The record accurately describes the source's nature as a listing page and appropriately recommends breaking out individual items. However, the source itself cannot be accepted as-is because it provides only titles/dates without substantive content. Human review is needed to: (1) confirm rejection of this listing page, (2) authorize extraction of individual substantive items (FOMC minutes 1/27-28/2026, capital rule modernization proposal 3/19/2026, tokenized securities guidance 3/5/2026, stress test finalization 2/4/2026) as separate archive records with full source content.

notes: Source is a listing page (PAGE_TYPE: press_release) that aggregates 26 separate Fed announcements. While it contains items relevant to market structure and macro catalysts (FOMC minutes, capital rule proposals, stress tests), the page itself provides only titles and dates without substantive content. Individual press releases should be extracted separately for meaningful research records. The most actionable items for targeted archival are the FOMC minutes release and the capital rule modernization proposal, as these have direct implications for monetary policy and bank capital requirements respectively.
